title: Local Input Security, Resource Limits, Privacy, and Diagnostics
description: Imported mazes allocate from untrusted dimensions, pickle is accepted, paths escape their root, and logs retain player data indefinitely. Learners cumulatively produce bounded local-data threat model and controls through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Identify untrusted files, dimensions, strings, paths, package resources, environment state, logs, and denial-of-service consequences.
Use bounded data-only formats and reject pickle or executable object reconstruction for untrusted saves.
Validate dimensions, cell counts, edge counts, nesting, string length, numeric ranges, and total work before allocation.
